channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: 斯塔默称英国不会卷入“更广泛战争”
item.description: Comment from British prime minister comes as German government warns of danger of ‘never-ending’ conflict

item.title: 法国极左极右势力崛起令主流政党陷困境
item.description: Awkward choices emerge for mainstream parties after the first round of mayoral elections.

item.title: 迪拜机场遭无人机袭击，阿联酋航空调整航线
item.description: Flights from Manchester, Edinburgh and Dublin among those that returned to destinations on Monday

item.title: Postgres TUI客户端pgtui发布
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/mbljtb/introducing_pgtui_postgres_tui_client">Comments</a></p>

item.title: 美国团体如何驱动英国新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: 2026年奥斯卡金像奖完整获奖名单
item.description: See the whole list of all the winners at the 98th Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences Awards held at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles

item.title: 散户从私募信贷金矿撤资数十亿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 英企雇24岁以下失业者可得3000英镑补贴
item.description: It comes as ministers grapple with spiralling unemployment rates among young people.

item.title: 印度对俄乌拉尔原油需求增长，价格创纪录
item.description: Prices for Russia’s key export blend delivered to India hit a record high after the US widened its permit allowing countries to buy the nation’s crude.

item.title: 策略师Verrone：市场尚未见“流动性紧缩”
item.description: Christopher Verrone, partner and chief market strategist at Strategas, examines market reaction to the Iran war and the policy response he expects from the Federal Reserve. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: 无醇啤酒与宠物美容纳入通胀测算
item.description: Houmous and motorhomes are also added to the basket of goods and services used to chart the rising cost of living.

item.title: 奥尔塞竞购商银为全面掌控裕信铺平道路
item.description: UniCredit SpA made a €35 billion ($40 billion) bid for Commerzbank AG designed to increase its shareholding beyond 30%, easing the path for a potential future acquisition despite fierce opposition fro

item.title: 钢厂日运营成本高达130万英镑
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标进展艰难
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊朗示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 德黑兰居民：伊朗正采取措施防抗议
item.description: Residents describe new security checkpoints around the capital, where they say people are stopped and searched.

item.title: 以色列扩大在黎巴嫩南部地面行动
item.description: The Israeli army says it has begun limited targeted ground operations against Hezbollah in South Lebanon. It comes three weeks after the US and Israel began carrying out strikes in Iran, a war that ha

item.title: 缅甸亲军方政党主导议会五年后复会
item.description: New parliament opens for the first time since the 2021 coup after elections that excluded major opposition parties.

item.title: 高市称暂无派遣自卫队赴霍尔木兹护航计划
item.description: The prime minister said such an operation would be legally “very difficult,” adding that Japan had not been asked to join a coalition to help secure vessels in the waterway.

item.title: 乌克兰在金融前线展开紧急斗争
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 金价波动：高油价威胁美联储利率路径
item.description: Gold traded in a narrow range near $5,000 an ounce, as the conflict in the Middle East entered a third week and investors weighed the inflationary impact of higher oil prices.

item.title: 股市期货上涨，油价因霍尔木兹希望下跌：市场综述
item.description: US stock futures edged higher and oil prices reversed an advance on hopes that more tankers could traverse the Strait of Hormuz, with talks ongoing to ensure the waterway’s security.

item.title: 受制于油市的债市考虑转向增长担忧
item.description: Bond investors are starting to ponder whether the inflation worries sparked by the Iran war will soon tip over into concern about the risk to economic growth from elevated oil prices.

item.title: VinFast亏损扩大仍将重启美国电动车厂建设
item.description: Vietnamese electric vehicle maker VinFast Auto Ltd. said it will resume construction on its North Carolina factory this year while reporting a wider loss in the fourth quarter as costs tied to its glo

item.title: 亚洲DayOne数据中心据称接近秘密递交在美IPO申请
item.description: DayOne Data Centers Ltd. is close to filing confidentially for an initial public offering in the US, people familiar with the matter said, paving the way for another multibillion-dollar deal in an ind

item.title: 南非警方：举报人谋杀案嫌疑人为前精英警官
item.description: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.

item.title: 保障数字资产，抵御未来威胁
奥斯卡关键瞬间：遭冷落的Chalamet成笑柄
item.description: Here's what happened inside the winners room and other insights from the biggest night in Hollywood.

item.title: 吹哨人称TikTok与Meta为算法竞赛罔顾安全
item.description: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.

item.title: 印度医院ICU火灾致10人死亡
item.description: All the victims of the fire in Odisha state are patients, and 11 hospital staff are being treated for burns.
